Theorem 4 
                         
                            Let  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            be a skill multimap and  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            be the knowledge structure delineated by  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                            
                            . Assume  
                            
                               
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     q 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             
                            has the minimum  
                            
                               
                                  
                                     M 
                                  
                                  
                                     q 
                                  
                               
                             
                            for each  
                            
                               
                                  q 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                               
                            
                            . Then the following are equivalent. 
                         
                         
                            
                               (1) 
                            
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            is bi-discriminative. 
                         
                         
                            
                               (2) 
                            
                            
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  q 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                                  } 
                               
                             
                            is pairwise incomparable with respect to set inclusion.

Let  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            be a skill multimap and  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            be the knowledge structure delineated by  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                            
                            . Assume  
                            
                               
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     q 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             
                            has the minimum  
                            
                               
                                  
                                     M 
                                  
                                  
                                     q 
                                  
                               
                             
                            for each  
                            
                               
                                  q 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                               
                            
                            . Then the following are equivalent.

(1) 
                            
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            is bi-discriminative.

(2) 
                            
                            
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  q 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                                  } 
                               
                             
                            is pairwise incomparable with respect to set inclusion.

Proof 
                         Let  
                               p 
                             be the problem function induced by  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                            . 
                         (1)  
                               ⟹ 
                             (2): Assume  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             is bi-discriminative. Let  
                               
                                  q 
                                  , 
                                  r 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                               
                             with  
                               
                                  q 
                                  ≠ 
                                  r 
                               
                            . By  Theorem 3 ,  
                               
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     q 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ⋐ 
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     r 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             and  
                               
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     r 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ⋐ 
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     q 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            . If  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⊆ 
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            , then  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⊆ 
                                  T 
                               
                             for all  
                               
                                  T 
                                  ∈ 
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     r 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            . It shows that  
                               
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     r 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ⋐ 
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     q 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            , which is a contradiction. By the same way, if  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⊆ 
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            , then  
                               
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     q 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ⋐ 
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     r 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            . It is also a contradiction. So  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ⊆ 
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                  
                               
                             and  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ⊆ 
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            . 
                         (2)  
                               ⟹ 
                             (1): Suppose (2) holds. By  Lemma 1 (2), we only need to prove that  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             is a  
                               
                                  
                                     T 
                                  
                                  
                                     1 
                                  
                               
                            -knowledge structure. Let  
                               
                                  q 
                                  , 
                                  r 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                               
                             with  
                               
                                  q 
                                  ≠ 
                                  r 
                               
                            . Then  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ⊆ 
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                  
                               
                             and  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ⊆ 
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            . It is clear that  
                               
                                  q 
                                  ∈ 
                                  P 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           M 
                                        
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ∈ 
                                  K 
                               
                             and  
                               
                                  r 
                                  ∈ 
                                  P 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           M 
                                        
                                        
                                           r 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ∈ 
                                  K 
                               
                            . We claim  
                               
                                  r 
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ∈ 
                                  P 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           M 
                                        
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             and  
                               
                                  q 
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ∈ 
                                  P 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           M 
                                        
                                        
                                           r 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ∈ 
                                  K 
                               
                            . In fact, if  
                               
                                  r 
                                  ∈ 
                                  p 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           M 
                                        
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            , then there is  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        T 
                                     
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                  
                                  ∈ 
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     r 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             such that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        T 
                                     
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⊆ 
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            . Thus, we derive  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⊆ 
                                  
                                     
                                        T 
                                     
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⊆ 
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            , which contradicts  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ⊆ 
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            . So  
                               
                                  r 
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ∈ 
                                  P 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           M 
                                        
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            . Similarly,  
                               
                                  q 
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ∈ 
                                  P 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           M 
                                        
                                        
                                           r 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ∈ 
                                  K 
                               
                            . Consequently,  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             is a  
                               
                                  
                                     T 
                                  
                                  
                                     1 
                                  
                               
                            -knowledge structure.  □

Let  
                               p 
                             be the problem function induced by

                             (2): Assume

                             (1): Suppose (2) holds. By  Lemma 1 (2), we only need to prove that

                                  ⁄

                                           r 
                                        
                                     
                                     )

                                  K 
                               
                            . Consequently,

                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             is a  
                               
                                  
                                     T 
                                  
                                  
                                     1 
                                  
                               
                            -knowledge structure.  □

Theorem 4  gives an answer to  Question 1*  under the condition that  
                         
                            μ 
                            
                               ( 
                               q 
                               ) 
                            
                         
                       has the minimum  
                         
                            
                               M 
                            
                            
                               q 
                            
                         
                       for each  
                         
                            q 
                            ∈ 
                            Q 
                         
                      .

Corollary 4 
                         
                            Let  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            be a conjunctive skill multimap, where  
                            
                               
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     q 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     { 
                                     
                                        
                                           T 
                                        
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                     
                                     } 
                                  
                               
                             
                            for each  
                            
                               
                                  q 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                               
                            
                            . Then the delineated knowledge structure is bi-discriminative if and only if  
                            
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     
                                        T 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  q 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                                  } 
                               
                             
                            is pairwise incomparable with respect to set inclusion.

Let  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            be a conjunctive skill multimap, where  
                            
                               
                                  μ

                                     q 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     { 
                                     
                                        
                                           T 
                                        
                                        
                                           q 
                                        
                                     
                                     } 
                                  
                               
                             
                            for each  
                            
                               
                                  q 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                               
                            
                            . Then the delineated knowledge structure is bi-discriminative if and only if  
                            
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     
                                        T 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  q 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                                  } 
                               
                             
                            is pairwise incomparable with respect to set inclusion.

Remark 5 
                         Comparing  Theorem 4  with  Theorem 2 , one also can see the unusual differences of characterizations between separability and bi-separability. Let  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                             and  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             be described as in  Example 5 . Then  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     { 
                                     a 
                                     } 
                                  
                               
                             and  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     { 
                                     a 
                                     , 
                                     b 
                                     } 
                                  
                               
                            . It shows that, in  Theorem 4 , the condition “ 
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             is bi-discriminative” is not equivalent to the condition “ 
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        M 
                                     
                                     
                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ∈ 
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     r 
                                     )

                                        r

                                  ∈

                                     (

                                  q 
                                  , 
                                  r 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                               
                             with  
                               
                                  q 
                                  ≠ 
                                  r 
                               
                            ”.

The following proposition shows that the prolongation of skill multimap preserves the separability and the bi-separability of items in the delineated knowledge structures.

Proposition 3

                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            is discriminative (resp. bi-discriminative).

Let

Proof 
                         We only prove parenthesis part. The proof of non-parenthesis part is similar, we omit it. 
                         Assume  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             is bi-discriminative. Whenever  
                               
                                  q 
                                  , 
                                  r 
                                  ∈ 
                                  Q 
                               
                             with  
                               
                                  q 
                                  ≠ 
                                  r 
                               
                            . By  Theorem 2 ,  
                               
                                  μ

                                     q 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ⋐ 
                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     r 
                                     )

                                  C 
                                  ∈ 
                                  μ

                                     q

                                  ⁄ 
                                  ⋐ 
                                  μ

                                     r

                                  ∈ 
                                  
                                     
                                        μ 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     q 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             such that  
                               
                                  C 
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        C 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  ∩ 
                                  S 
                               
                            . It is clear that

                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⁄ 
                                  ⋐ 
                                  
                                     
                                        μ 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′

                                  ⁄

                                     r

We only prove parenthesis part. The proof of non-parenthesis part is similar, we omit it.

                                        ,

                                        } 
                                     
                                     } 
                                  
                               
                            ,  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        μ 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′

                                     r

                                  =

                                  μ

                                  μ

                                     r 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     { 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        a 
                                        } 
                                     
                                     } 
                                  
                               
                            . Then the skill function  
                               
                                  (

                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′

                             prolongs the skill function  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S

                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                            . Let

                                  ) 
                               
                             be knowledge structures delineated by  
                               
                                  (

                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′

                                  ) 
                               
                             is bi-discriminative from  Theorem 2 . However,  
                               
                                  μ

                                  = 
                                  μ

Contrary to the prolongation of skill multimap, a submultimap of a skill multimap is the “shortening” of a skill multimap, which delineates a substructure of a knowledge structure.

From  Lemma 2  and  Proposition 1 , the following result is obtained immediately. It shows that submultimap of the skill multimap preserves the separability and the bi-separability of items in the delineated knowledge structures.

Proposition 4 
                         
                            Let  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            and  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            be knowledge structures delineated by skill multimaps  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        μ 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            and  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                            
                            , respectively. Additionally, let  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            be a submultimap of  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        μ 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  ) 
                               
                            
                            . If  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            is discriminative (resp. bi-discriminative), then  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            is discriminative (resp. bi-discriminative).

Let  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        ′ 
                                     
                                  
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            and  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            be knowledge structures delineated by skill multimaps

In their book,  Doignon and Falmagne (1999)  introduced the notion of a so-called mesh for describing the integration of two knowledge structures on the union of their domains.  Heller and Repitsch (2008)  generalized the mesh to a finite or even infinite number of knowledge structures.

The following definition comes from  Heller and Repitsch  ( 2008 ), which provides a straightforward construction for integrating the different skill functions into a single skill assignment defined on the union of the domains and the skill sets, respectively.

Around distributed skill functions and the meshing of the delineated knowledge structures, Heller and Repitsch posed two questions. The following question is the one of a two-part question, which was posed in Conclusion Section of  Heller and Repitsch (2008) .

Question 2 
                         
                            
                               (1) 
                             Can an assessment at the global level build upon the information collected within a local assessment? 
                         
                            
                               (2) 
                             Is it possible to localize a given global assessment to any of the local domains?

(1) 
                             Can an assessment at the global level build upon the information collected within a local assessment?

(2) 
                             Is it possible to localize a given global assessment to any of the local domains?

We discuss  Question 2  with respect to the separability and the bi-separability of items in knowledge structures delineated by skill functions. That is, around distributed skill functions and the meshing of the delineated knowledge structures, we wish to find a condition such that the separability (resp. bi-separability) of parent structure implies the separability (resp. bi-separability) of substructures; find a condition such that the separability (resp. bi-separability) of substructures implies the separability (resp. bi-separability) of parent structure. More precisely, we discuss the following  Question 3  under  Notation 1 .

                                  } 
                               
                             is  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                            -consistent if  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             is a mesh of  
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           Q 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                                  } 
                               
                            .

The following lemma is  Corollary 3 (ii) in  Heller and Repitsch (2008) .

Lemma 3 
                         
                            Heller & Repitsch, 2008 
                         
                         
                            If  
                            
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                                  } 
                               
                             
                            is pairwise disjoint, then  
                            
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           Q 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           S 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           μ 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                                  } 
                               
                             
                            is  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                            
                            -consistent.

If  
                            
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  i

Lemma 4 
                         
                            Suppose  
                            
                               
                                  {

                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                                  } 
                               
                             
                            is pairwise disjoint. If  
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            is discriminative (resp. bi-discriminative), then

                                        i

                                  )

                                  i 
                                  ∈

                            .

Suppose  
                            
                               
                                  {

                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            is discriminative (resp. bi-discriminative) for all  
                            
                               
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                               
                            
                            .

Proof 
                         We only prove non-parenthesis part. The proof of parenthesis part is similar, we omit it. 
                         Suppose  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             is discriminative. Since  
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                  |

                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                                  }

                                           S

                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           μ 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                                  } 
                               
                             is  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  S 
                                  , 
                                  μ 
                                  ) 
                               
                            -consistent from  Lemma 3 . So  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             is a mesh of  
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           Q 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           K 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                                  } 
                               
                            . By  Remark 6 ,  
                               
                                  ( 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  )

                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             for all  
                               
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                               
                            . It follows that  
                               
                                  (

                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  ) 
                               
                             is discriminative for all  
                               
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                               
                             from  Proposition 1 .  □

Lemma 5

                                     )

                                  μ

                            . It shows that

                                        q 
                                     
                                  
                                  ⁄

                                  μ 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     r

                            . It follows that

                                  ⁄

                                  μ 
                                  
                                     (

                            .

Case 2:  
                               
                                  q 
                                  ∈

                                  K

                             is discriminative.  □

As an immediate result of  Lemmas 4 and 5 , the following theorem gives an answer to  Question 3 .

Theorem 5 
                         
                            Assume both  
                            
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                                  } 
                               
                             
                            and  
                            
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                                  } 
                               
                             
                            are pairwise disjoint. Then the following are equivalent. 
                         
                         
                            
                               (1) 
                            
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            is discriminative (resp. bi-discriminative). 
                         
                         
                            
                               (2) 
                            
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            is discriminative (resp. bi-discriminative) for all  
                            
                               
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                               
                            
                            .

Assume both  
                            
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                                  } 
                               
                             
                            and  
                            
                               
                                  { 
                                  
                                     
                                        S 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                  | 
                                  
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                                  } 
                               
                             
                            are pairwise disjoint. Then the following are equivalent.

(1) 
                            
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  Q 
                                  , 
                                  K 
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            is discriminative (resp. bi-discriminative).

(2) 
                            
                            
                               
                                  ( 
                                  
                                     
                                        Q 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  , 
                                  
                                     
                                        K 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  ) 
                               
                             
                            is discriminative (resp. bi-discriminative) for all  
                            
                               
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  I 
                               
                            
                            .

The following two examples show that both  Lemmas 4 and 5  are not reverted.

There are some separations that land between  
                         
                            
                               T 
                            
                            
                               0 
                            
                         
                      -separation and  
                         
                            
                               T 
                            
                            
                               1 
                            
                         
                      -separation for topological spaces. A classical work by Aull and Thron could be a good place to start.  Aull and Thron (1962)  investigated a number of separations in topological spaces:  
                         
                            
                               T 
                            
                            
                               D 
                            
                         
                      ,  
                         
                            
                               T

                               D

                               D

                               F

                               T

                               F
